info.title: Universoid.Spatial.Esri.ArcPyCli.Console.App
info.description:
DotNet Tool to start the common ESRI arcpy enabled python Executable. It is not endorsed, affiliated or supported by Esri!
      ! This is a pre alpha version !

commands.name: list
commands.description: Retrieve a list of all available ESRI arcpy enabled python environments.

options.name: --format
options.description:
(Default: console) Switch to 'json' to get the cli
output into a json/yaml readable format for further
processing.

options.name: --environment
options.description:
Switch between the Python environments, if available.
(Python 2.7 only 'current' environment available)

options.name: --architecture
options.description:
(Default: Unknown) Switch between 'X32' and 'X64'
process architecture.

options.name: --runtime
options.description:
(Default: Unknown) Switch between 'ArcMap' and 'ArcGIS'
runtime.

options.name: --path
options.description:
Choose this option to get only the Python path on the
command line. Use this for Scripts, etc.

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
(Default: false) Show verbose logging information on
the console.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run the Command in the ESRI arcpy enabled python environment. Example Usage: arcpy-cli <options> --pycmd [option] ... [-c cmd | -m mod | file | -] [arg] ...

options.name: --environment
options.description:
(Default: current) Switch between the Python
environments, if available. (Python 2.7 only 'current'
environment available)

options.name: --architecture
options.description:
(Default: X64) Switch between 'X32' and 'X64' process
architecture.

options.name: --runtime
options.description:
(Default: ArcGis) Switch between 'ArcMap' and 'ArcGIS'
runtime.

options.name: --format
options.description:
(Default: console) Switch to 'json' to get the cli
output into a json/yaml readable format for further
processing.

options.name: --pycmd
options.description:
Use this parameter to separate the arcpy cli options
from the native python command. The software will just
split the command here.

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
(Default: false) Show verbose logging information on
the console.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: set-current
commands.description: Set the ESRI ArcGIS X64 python environment.

options.name: --environment
options.description:
(Default: arcgispro-py3) The name of the new
environment.

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
(Default: false) Show verbose logging information on the
console.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
